ogTitle: Upper Orara vs Upper Rollands Plains: Climate Safety

heading: Upper Orara vs Upper Rollands Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Orara, New South Wales and Upper Rollands Plains, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Rollands Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Upper Orara (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Orara or Upper Rollands Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Orara has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Upper Rollands Plains scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Orara scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Rollands Plains scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Orara or Upper Rollands Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Rollands Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
